# add-task

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders add_task MCP tool calls with task title, description, and a clickable chip to open the created task.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `JsonlViewerTool.Renderer` "add_task$" → `AddTaskToolView`
  - Uses: `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call.JsonlViewerTool`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call.ToolCallCard`, `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/frame.Frame`, `primitives/css/link-chip.LinkChip`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/live-state.useResource`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`, `tasks/task-detail.taskDetailPane`, `tasks/task-status.StatusIcon`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
